code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut have_prev = false
mut prev = 0

let total = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < total
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(n)
          if not have_prev or n != prev
            result = list.push(result, n)
            prev = n
            have_prev = true
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(n)
    if not have_prev or n != prev
      result = list.push(result, n)
      prev = n
      have_prev = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let rlen = list.len(result)
while k < rlen
  match list.get(result, k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(out)
